scripts.clean: pnpm --dir packages/common clean && pnpm --dir packages/elements clean && pnpm --dir packages/simulator clean && pnpm --dir apps/www clean && pnpm --dir examples/elements-example clean
scripts.build:packages: pnpm --dir packages/common build && pnpm --dir packages/elements build && pnpm --dir packages/simulator build
scripts.build:site-deps: pnpm run build:packages && pnpm run build:www
scripts.build: pnpm run build:site-deps && pnpm run build:example
scripts.lint:packages: pnpm --dir packages/common lint && pnpm --dir packages/elements lint && pnpm --dir packages/simulator lint
scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:packages && pnpm run lint:www && pnpm run lint:tutorial
scripts.typecheck:packages: pnpm --dir packages/common typecheck && pnpm --dir packages/elements typecheck && pnpm --dir packages/simulator typecheck
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:packages && pnpm run typecheck:www
scripts.test:packages: pnpm --dir packages/common test && pnpm --dir packages/elements test && pnpm --dir packages/simulator test
scripts.test: pnpm run test:packages && pnpm run test:www
scripts.test:ci:packages: pnpm --dir packages/common test:ci && pnpm --dir packages/elements test:ci && pnpm --dir packages/simulator test:ci
scripts.test:ci: pnpm run test:ci:packages && pnpm run test:ci:www
scripts.docs: pnpm --dir packages/common docs && pnpm --dir packages/elements docs && pnpm --dir packages/simulator docs
scripts.fix:style: pnpm exec prettier ./packages/common/src --write && pnpm exec prettier ./packages/simulator/src --write && pnpm exec prettier ./packages/elements/src --write
scripts.size: pnpm --dir packages/common size && pnpm --dir packages/elements size && pnpm --dir packages/simulator size
